text.<color=#ff911c>ダートの短距離路線</color>で戦いながら\\:
You'll be battling your way to the BC
through the <color=#ff911c>Dirt Sprints</color> route.
text.<color=#ff911c>芝の短距離路線</color>で戦いながら\\nB:
You'll be battling your way to the BC
through the <color=#ff911c>Turf Sprints</color> route.
text.<color=#ff911c>ダートのマイル/中距離路線</color>で戦いな:

through the <color=#ff911c>Dirt Mile/Medium</color> route.
text.<color=#ff911c>芝の中距離路線</color>で戦いながら\\nB:
You'll be battling your way to the BC
through the <color=#ff911c>Turf Medium</color> route.
text.<color=#ff911c>芝のマイル路線</color>で戦いながら\\nB:
You'll be battling your way to the BC
through the <color=#ff911c>Turf Mile</color> route.
text.<color=#ff911c>ダートのマイル路線</color>で戦いながら\\:
You'll be battling your way to the BC
through the <color=#ff911c>Dirt Mile</color> route.
text.<color=#ff911c>芝のマイル/中距離路線</color>で戦いながら:
